description: The user must record his voice input and then go to the LLM which includes ASR, used to generate a text from speech, NLP used to allow computers to understand, generate, and collaborate with human language
The user will have to answer some questions to analyze their personality while this operation our system will record his voice to use it in the voice cloning
The user will upload an image, then the system will process the image and generate a lifelike 3D digital twin avatar based on the image
The user will have a conversation with the digital twin through a speech-to-text feature
The user shall be able to sign Up to create a new account
The user shall be able to login to their account
The user shall be able to edit his profile
The user shall be able to logout
The user shall be able to upload images to predict a 3D Model
The user should be able to upload images to show their emotions
The user will record their voice to make their avatar have the same voice

The user will have to answer some question about their life, attitude or a specific situation and how he/she will handle that situation and also they will record their facial expression to make their avatar has the same concept as thinking
The user will have the ability to customize the avatar look
The system shall make the avatar respond on user’s input by voice
The system shall understand and contextualizes User’s input
The system shall clone the user’s voice
The system shall make the avatar adapt on the user
The system shall create the avatar based on user requirements
The system shall make the avatar express emotions based on images and conversations
The user can interact with the avatar by texting or voice chatting giving commands or questions
The user can upload a file of their voice to make their avatar have the same voice or to their beloved ones
